name: sutra
description: A local-first student, life, and work workspace: notes, tasks, calendar, focus, AP prep, college apps, and more. Runs as a single static web app.
author: Tanuj Ranjith

scripts.check:all: node scripts/smoke-check.mjs && node scripts/round-trip-check.mjs && node scripts/version-history-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-rebrand-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-compat-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-csp-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-persistence-health-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-modal-a11y-check.mjs && node scripts/sutra-network-check.mjs
